# Instituto Lian Huan - Medicina Tradicional Chinesa

## About
Instituto Lian Huan is a reference center for Traditional Chinese Medicine in Caruaru, Brazil. We offer evidence-based treatments including Acupuncture, Tai Chi Chuan, Chinese Herbal Medicine, Cupping Therapy, and Therapeutic Massage.

## Location
Rua Valdemar Mario de Oliveira, 236
Caruaru - PE | CEP: 55031-416
Brazil

## Contact
Phone: +55 81 3725-9706
WhatsApp: +55 81 99103-7789
Instagram: @lian_huan_instituto

## Treatments
- Acupuncture
- Tai Chi Chuan
- Chinese Herbal Medicine
- Cupping Therapy (Ventosaterapia)
- Therapeutic Massage

## Team
- José Ivo Sampaio - Terapeuta e Sifu (Acupuncture, Chi Kung)
- Danielle Sampaio - Terapeuta em MTC

## Evidence-Based Approach
Our treatments are guided by the best available scientific evidence:
- Acupuncture for chronic pain, migraine, and osteoarthritis (Vickers et al., 2012)
- Tai Chi for Parkinson's balance, osteoarthritis pain, and cardiac rehabilitation (Li et al., 2012; Wang et al., 2009; Nery et al., 2015)
- Cupping for chronic musculoskeletal pain (BMJ Open, 2025)
